title: Fabulous Vanilla
description: Vanilla Minecraft, but better. Lightweight Vanilla+ modpack with lots of cool features and visual improvements without FPS reduction.
body:
# Fabulous Minecraft Vanilla+ modpack
## This modpack contains:
- Better first-person animations (Hold my Items)
- Better third-person animations (Fresh Moves and Fresh animations)
- Mob animations
- Fresh and beautiful GUIs
- Improved every Minecraft dungeon, but still vanilla-like
- Vanilla-friendly teleport to home using lodestone and chorus fruit
- Optimization (lightweight modpack with lots of optimization)
- New sounds
- Lots of visual improvements
- World generation overhaul
- Lots of new tasty food
- Shaders that do not affect fps (ReShaded)
- Lots of QoL improvements

If you find any bugs or have any ideas on how to improve the modpack, please write about them on the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/zxFBvFnuqQ)
